title: crassocephalum crepidioides f. luteum
intro: Crassocephalum crepidioides f. luteum, also known as Yellow Bushland Plant or Yellow Leafed Land Snakewort, is a flowering plant species in the aster family, Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Crassocephalum crepidioides f. luteum are believed to provide health benefits such as treating fever, wounds, and skin infections, as well as aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized in various traditional remedies.
